prompt: I'm trying to connect my agent-messenger CLI to a remote server at https://messaging.example.com instead of localhost. How do I permanently save that, and how do I verify it's set correctly?

assertions.text: Includes 'config set server_url' with the correct URL
Includes a verification command (config get or config get server_url)
Explains that the setting is persistent (saved to config file)
assertions.check: response mentions persistence or config file
